resources.name: Runcode
resources.author: ov-studio
resources.tagline: Execute Lua code directly from the console
resources.description:
Runcode is a lightweight runtime code executor that works on both
the client and the server.

Type `run <code>` into the console to compile and execute arbitrary
Lua on the fly — no need to reload scripts or restart. Both
expressions and statements are supported, and results (or errors)
are printed straight back to you, formatted and easy to read.

Perfect for quick debugging, prototyping, and live tweaks, whether
you're working client-side or server-side.
